# page-foundry

> An open-source Claude Code skill that turns one brief into a finished marketing page (homepage, landing page, or sales page) that does not read or look AI-made.

page-foundry is an orchestrator. One command runs the best marketing and design skills in order (positioning, customer research, conversion, copywriting, design), gates the result against eight ship gates, and outputs static HTML you own or a design-handoff package for any tool. When a companion skill is missing it uses a weaker built-in fallback and reports the run as partial. The voice gate catches AI language patterns, not just AI words; the integrity gate refuses fabricated proof and staged demos.

## Links

- [Homepage](https://taylorbanks.github.io/page-foundry/)
- [Source](https://github.com/taylorbanks/page-foundry)

## Facts

- Built by: Taylor Banks
- Platform: Claude Code skill (skills CLI, Claude Code plugin, claude.ai upload)
- Pricing: free, MIT licensed
- Data handling: ships one standard-library Python scanner; no network, no subprocess, no dependencies
